title: add Services, WhyMe, Process, FAQ sections to Kore homepage
description:
## Summary

- Add 4 missing sections to `web.korczewski.de` in Kore-native dark style: **Services** (01/07), **WhyMe** (02/07), **Process** (03/07), **FAQ** (—)
- Fix broken nav anchor (`#notes` → `#timeline`) and move KorePillars to `id="work"` so `#services` correctly points to the new professional services section
- Renumber all existing section labels from x/04 to x/07
- No Stripe — services link to `#contact`; FAQ uses native `<details>/<summary>` (no JS)

## Test Plan
- [x] All offline tests pass (`task test:all`, FAIL=0)
- [x] Verified live at `https://web.korczewski.de`: all 9 section IDs present (`services`, `why`, `process`, `work`, `timeline`, `bugs`, `team`, `faq`, `contact`), correct numbering (01–07), FAQ accordion, services rows with "Anfragen →" links
- [x] `web.mentolder.de` unaffected (mentolder branch in `index.astro` untouched)
